attributes.action:
Cut fuel duty tax by 50-75%
To help people with COL and oil crisis
attributes.additional_details: Right now fuel prices are through the roof due to the trouble in the middle east and I feel like this is the only real solution in helping folk get by.
attributes.background: Reduce fuel duty tax to make petrol and diesel more affordable for the people during the cost of living crisis.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Reduce fuel duty tax to at least half of the current rates" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764577
